% Real pre-#60-fix manuscript snippet (from manuscript repo a11db6c^)
% This file demonstrates whether validator R4 PATTERN-A catches the real
% historical boundary-axiom violation that #60 fixed.

\section{Setup (excerpt — Iverson boundary axiom)}
\label{sec:setup}

Iverson's law of similarity stipulates the boundary conditions
$\gamma(1, s) = 1$ and $\eta(1, s) = s$, such that scaling by
$\lambda = 1$ is the identity on the Iverson reindexing.

\section{Theorem 1 (excerpt — pre-#60-fix hypothesis)}
\label{sec:thm1}

\begin{theorem}[Gain-control with $\eta(\lambda,s)=f(s)$ — pre-fix]
\label{thm:eta-s}
Suppose $\xi$ satisfies Iverson's law of similarity with
$\eta(\lambda, s) = f(s)$ for a continuous function $f\colon S \to S$
(the $\eta = s$ specialization corresponds to $f = \mathrm{id}_S$, subsumed
in what follows).
\end{theorem}

\textbf{Case (B): Logarithmic.}
$u(y) = a \ln y + d + e\,c$,
$v(x) = a b \ln x + d$, $\sigma(x) = c$ const.,
$\gamma(\lambda, s) = \lambda^b\, e^{c(s - f(s))/a}$
(reduces to $\lambda^b$ at $f = \mathrm{id}$; $f$ may be any continuous map here).

\textbf{Case (C): Power.}
$u(y) = c\,e\, y^a + d$,
$\gamma(\lambda, s) = \lambda^b\, \sqrt[a]{(s + c_2/c)/(f(s) + c_2/c)}$
(reduces to $\lambda^b$ at $f = \mathrm{id}$; $f$ may be any continuous map here).
